title: Woven Storage Basket, Cotton Rope Basket for Shelves Closet Organizer, Square Shelf Basket for Toys, Books, Shoes, Decorative Empty Gift Basket for Home Bathroom Decor, 33x25x22.5cm, Black Jute
features: Multifunctional Towel Basket: Measuring 33 x 25 x 22.5 cm, this basket offers generous storage space. Crafted from soft cotton rope, it's both safe and stylish, perfect for organizing everyday items like books, toys, or office supplies on shelves, keeping your living space tidy

Woven Baskets for Storage: Equipped with labels! When you write words on the label, such as laundry supplies, toys, towels, etc. Even if this storage basket is placed on high closet shelves, you will immediately know what you are storing
Convenient Handles: The toy basket is designed with sturdy handles for effortless lifting from shelves or closets, regardless of the contents, giving you a more relaxed and enjoyable user experience

Versatile Storage Solutions: Ideal for any room in the house, from the living room to the laundry room, bedroom, or kitchen. This rope basket not only provides convenient storage but also enhances the aesthetic appeal and organization of your home
Note: The gift basket is folded for transport, it will quickly turn back to its elegant shape when you fill it with some towels or clothes, an iron is also a good idea
